race.comment: Race complexion turned on its head after key scratchings. GENERAL GORDON (4) has not raced since his debut back on November 3 when he finished sixth over 1250m at Ballina. Will be better for that run. Placed in a recent trial at Beaudesert and is a leading contender. FUTURE HERO (9) ran midfield last start at Gold Coast Poly. Is up in distance today is in the mix. PACIFIC REEL (5) is an eight start maiden however has shown enough in his past few starts to suggest he can shed that tag. MOONSPELL (12) ran a good race two starts back in what was her best run this prep. COMEON KINGWILLIAM (2) next elect after running second in a small field at Murwillumbah first up.
